facebook.caption: Tourists stick to the night market. Locals shop here. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc is the real daily market, open early, packed with fresh seafood, tropical fruit, and street snacks at prices the resort strip will never match. 4.3 stars across 398 reviews and most visitors walk right past it. Get here before 8am. That's when it's worth it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Vendors stacking fresh catch at 6am. Live crabs, dragon fruit, dried squid, local sauces, all in one tight market lane at Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc. This is where Phu Quoc actually shops.

instagram.caption: Locals shop here. Tourists keep walking. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc, 4.3★, 398 reviews, zero resort markup. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 6am at Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc. Fresh seafood, fruit stalls, zero tourist pricing. This is the real Phu Quoc.

tiktok.caption: Locals shop here. Tourists miss it every time. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc hits different at 6am. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocMarket #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
